_description: Review checks and migration notes: prod near-misses, deprecated patterns, API contract migrations. Append only; tag `migration` entries with `old_pattern` and `new_pattern`.

title: Never mock the database in tests
Migrate /v1/ingest to accept idempotency keys
new_pattern: POST /v1/ingest with required `Idempotency-Key` header; server stores key/response for 24h
